## Platform / API Requested

**Platform name:**
<!-- e.g., AWS API Gateway, Azure APIM, ServiceNow, Salesforce, SAP, Workday -->

**Platform type:**
- [ ] Cloud API Gateway (AWS, Azure, GCP)
- [ ] iPaaS / Integration Platform (Boomi, Informatica, Workato)
- [ ] CRM / ERP (Salesforce, SAP, HubSpot)
- [ ] Financial / Payments (Stripe, Plaid, Dwolla)
- [ ] Healthcare (Epic, Cerner, FHIR server)
- [ ] Custom REST / GraphQL / gRPC API
- [ ] Other: ___________

**Platform documentation / API reference:**
<!-- Link to the API docs -->

---

## Your Use Case

**What would you orchestrate with this integration?**
<!-- Describe the workflow — e.g., "Route customer payment intents across Stripe and PayPal based on geography and cost" -->

**How critical is this for your adoption of AgentFlow?**
- [ ] Blocking — I can't use AgentFlow without it
- [ ] Important — would significantly improve my use case
- [ ] Nice to have — would be a bonus
